title: Uruguayan Turkey Tacos
description: A flavorful twist on traditional tacos, featuring juicy Uruguayan-style turkey and a hint of buttery goodness.
instructions: Season the turkey breast with buttery taco seasoning and cook in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until cooked through.
While the turkey is cooking, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced jalapeños and diced red onion to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes or until softened.
Once the turkey is done, slice it into thin strips and add it to the skillet with the jalapeño and onion mixture.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the turkey is coated with the spice mixture.
Warm the tacos shells according to package instructions.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the turkey mixture onto a taco shell and topping with chopped cilantro and a squeeze of lime juice.
